# PR Summary
- FR Issue: <!-- e.g. FR-001 / #146 -->
- Role: <!-- Backend | Frontend | Fullstack -->
- Scope: <!-- What this PR changes -->

## Linked Issue
<!-- Required: keep one -->
- Refs #<!-- issue-number -->
- Closes #<!-- issue-number (use only when fully done) -->

## Change Details
- Main implementation:
- API/DB impact (if any):
- UI/UX impact (if any):
- Risk/rollback note:

## QA Checklist (Copilot + Human QA)
- [ ] PR title contains `FR-xxx`
- [ ] Branch name matches role format (`be-*` / `fe-*` / `dev-*`)
- [ ] Business logic matches FR spec in `doc/`
- [ ] Validation and error handling are covered
- [ ] RBAC/permission checks are correct
- [ ] No unrelated changes in this PR
- [ ] Copilot review completed and comments addressed
- [ ] Human QA reviewed and approved

## Evidence
- Screenshots / recordings (for FE):
- Test notes (manual/auto):
- Extra references:
